name: open-pencil-loop-workflow-tests
description: Workflow tests for open-pencil-loop skill - verifies role dispatch, parallel design awareness, and desktop app requirements

tests.name: Role Dispatch Detection
tests.prompt: I need to build a multi-page design system for a SaaS dashboard. The project has 5 pages: Landing, Dashboard, Settings, Profile, and Billing. Please coordinate the build.
tests.expected_output: Should detect ORCHESTRATOR role and dispatch subagents for each page. Should use add_page to create pages, dispatch SUBAGENTs for page building, dispatch REVIEWERs for verification, and use design_skeleton→design_content→design_refine for each page. Should NOT directly use design_skeleton/design_content itself.
assertions: Does NOT directly call design_skeleton or design_content

tests.name: Parallel Design Capability Awareness
tests.prompt: I need to build 10 landing pages in parallel for A/B testing. Each page has slight variations. Can I use open-pencil-loop for this?
tests.expected_output: Should explain that open-pencil-loop (official) operates SEQUENTIALLY and requires switch_page between edits. Should recommend openpencil-loop (fork) for parallel multi-page design since it supports pageId direct targeting. Should NOT claim official can parallel design.
assertions: Does NOT claim official can parallel design
Mentions desktop app requirement for official

tests.name: Desktop App Requirement Handling
tests.prompt: I want to use the open-pencil-loop skill to create a dashboard design. My desktop app is not running.
tests.expected_output: Should warn that desktop app is REQUIRED for open-pencil-loop. Should provide setup steps (download from GitHub, launch, configure MCP, verify with ping). Should mention WebSocket connection ws://127.0.0.1:7601. Should contrast with fork's offline capability. Should NOT proceed without desktop app.
assertions: Does NOT proceed without desktop app verification
